privileged_info_summary: Completed PI audit for chrome_env_all community_resource_navigator task. Confirmed that the task operates on synthetically generated files (a Netscape bookmarks HTML file and an agency browser guide text file) injected via setup_task.sh. Verified that the expected search shortcuts ('211', 'law', 'benefits'), homepage ('211.org'), startup pages ('211.org', 'benefits.gov'), default font size (20), minimum font size (14), and Chrome flags ('smooth-scrolling', 'reader-mode') match the task instructions. Discovered that the claimed folder names ['Housing', 'Health', 'Legal', 'Employment', 'Benefits'] contradict the explicitly required names in the guide ('Housing & Basic Needs', 'Health & Crisis Services', 'Legal & Immigration', 'Employment & Education', 'Benefits & Government'). Additionally, discovered a critical defect: 'verifier.py' is entirely missing from the task directory, making the task programmatically unscorable.
